criteria.name: Personalization Capabilities
criteria.description: The degree to which the app adapts to individual learning styles and paces using AI.
criteria.sources: App Store/Google Play descriptions, user reviews, expert reviews

criteria.name: AI-Driven Content Generation
criteria.description: The ability of the app to create new learning materials, exercises, or assessments using AI.

criteria.name: Intelligent Tutoring
criteria.description: The presence and effectiveness of AI-powered tutoring features, including feedback and guidance.
criteria.sources: User reviews, expert testing, app descriptions

criteria.name: User Rating
criteria.description: Average rating given by users on app stores.
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store

criteria.name: Number of Downloads
criteria.description: Total number of times the application has been downloaded.
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store
